scope_note: Design-artifact task. Quality gate is scoped: design-6 and .goals/ files must pass Prettier; full-repo pnpm format:check failures on pre-existing unrelated files are out of scope per goal.md scope boundaries.

history.summary: Design-6 artifacts passed scoped checks, but inspector failed on pre-existing repository-wide formatting issues outside the goal scope.

Formatted goal.md and inspector-feedback-1.md (whitespace-only). All scoped files (docs/designs/design-6/** and .goals/design-6-warm-instrument/**) pass Prettier. Added scope_note clarifying quality gate is scoped to design artifacts.
